qs.q: নিম্নলিখিত বাক্যটির ভয়েস পরিবর্তন করুন: He writes a letter.
o: A letter is written by him.
A letter was written by him.
A letter has been written by him.
A letter is being written by him.

qs.q: নিচের বাক্যটির ভয়েস পরিবর্তন করুন: She sang a song.
o: A song was sung by her.
A song is sung by her.
A song has been sung by her.
A song is being sung by her.

qs.q: প্রদত্ত বাক্যটির ভয়েস পরিবর্তন করুন: They are building a house.
o: A house is being built by them.
A house is built by them.
A house was being built by them.
A house has been built by them.

qs.q: এই বাক্যটির ভয়েস পরিবর্তন করুন: He had finished the work.
o: The work had been finished by him.
The work was finished by him.
The work has been finished by him.
The work is finished by him.

qs.q: নিম্নলিখিত বাক্যটির ভয়েস পরিবর্তন করুন: I will read a book.
o: A book will be read by me.
A book would be read by me.
A book is read by me.
A book was read by me.

qs.q: প্রদত্ত আদেশসূচক বাক্যটির ভয়েস পরিবর্তন করুন: Open the door.
o: Let the door be opened.
The door should be opened.
You are requested to open the door.
Let the door opened.

qs.q: এই প্রশ্নসূচক বাক্যটির ভয়েস পরিবর্তন করুন: Who broke the glass?
o: By whom was the glass broken?
Who was the glass broken by?
By whom the glass was broken?
Who broke the glass by whom?

qs.q: নিচের প্যাসিভ বাক্যটিকে অ্যাক্টিভে রূপান্তর করুন: The news was heard by him.
o: He heard the news.
He hears the news.
He had heard the news.
He was hearing the news.

qs.q: প্রদত্ত প্যাসিভ ভয়েসের বাক্যটিকে অ্যাক্টিভে পরিবর্তন করুন: The work has been done by them.
o: They have done the work.
They had done the work.
They did the work.
They are doing the work.

qs.q: নিম্নলিখিত বাক্যটির ভয়েস পরিবর্তন করুন: You must help the poor.
o: The poor must be helped by you.
The poor should be helped by you.
The poor must helped by you.
The poor are helped by you.
